title: Set up lazyit
description: A few quick steps to get your instance ready. This runs once.

error.title: Couldn't reach the server
error.description: The setup wizard needs to talk to the lazyit API. Check that the API is running and reachable, then try again.

alreadySetUp.title: Already set up
alreadySetUp.description: This instance already has an administrator. Taking you to sign in…

toast.adminCreatedMirrored: Administrator created and mirrored to your IdP

welcome.question: How do you want users to sign in to lazyit?

zitadel.title: Bundled Zitadel
zitadel.description: The recommended self-hosted identity provider, set up for you. No external accounts to wire.

byoi.title: Bring your own OIDC
byoi.description: Point lazyit at an OIDC provider you already run (Okta, Authentik, Keycloak, Entra ID…).

configure.zitadelReadyBody: Your identity provider was provisioned automatically — there is nothing to configure here. If sign-in isn't available yet, Zitadel may still be starting up; give it a moment.
configure.byoiConfirm: Confirm your OIDC provider is wired before continuing — the administrator you create next must be able to sign in through it.

byoi.instructions: Set these on the web app, then restart it:
byoi.note: lazyit discovers the rest from your provider. User and role management stays local — your IdP owns sign-in only.

admin.intro: Create the first administrator. This person can manage users, access and everything else.

checklist.minLength: Must be at least 8 characters long.
checklist.maxLength: Must be less than 70 characters long.

done.title: You're all set
done.bodyWithEmail: <email></email> is now the administrator. Sign in through your identity provider to start using lazyit.
done.bodyWithoutEmail: Your administrator account is ready. Sign in to start using lazyit.
